REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (504 Russia Avenue, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

The sale was confirmed at $250,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $250,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (504 Russia Avenue, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Scott Hodges.

Ms. Alavi requested a continuance for time to publish. The matter was continued to November 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Continued To May-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Thomas Latowski for Dave Come, Nancy Gate and Gloria Budhanan (Objectors).

Mr. Latowski appeared to object to the Petition Appointing Administrator for an Order Authorizing Independent Administration of Estate with full authority. The Court continued this matter to May 12, 2008 for filing of the Objection.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
